commercialRule: Inventra updates internally; users do not open GitHub, JSON, or choose files.
releaseNotes: Fixed the failed 10.0.1 permission patch by removing the bad icacls call.
Fixed the false MutationObserver verification failure from 10.0.1.
Resets the internal update download folder and verifies it is writable.
Clears stale update/download state when the app opens.
Hides stale update-not-prepared messages from older failed downloads.
No SQL, app data, products, suppliers, orders, reports, inventory, or updater backend logic changed.
